sources.description: Email, chat, and support messages grouped into compact threads with sender priority and age
sources.connector: mail API, Feishu, Slack, Gmail export, local fixture, or manual digest

sources.description: Open commitments, delegated tasks, due dates, and decisions waiting on the owner
sources.connector: task app, calendar, local markdown, or manual context

notes: Do not commit private message bodies; store compact summaries and evidence pointers.
Sending or committing on behalf of the owner remains a human gate.
